title: sclerochloa distans
intro: Sclerochloa distans is a perennial grass species native to Europe and parts of Asia, characterized by its coarse and hairy leaves. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Sclerochloa distans include its ability to soothe sore throats, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu. Herbal preparations of Sclerochloa distans are often made by infusing the plant's leaves in hot water to create a tea, or by using the plant's roots in tincture form.
